title: ourisia pulchella
intro: Ourisia pulchella, also known as the Rock Daisy or Blue-eyed Daisy, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Ourisia pulchella can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular natural remedy among herbalists.
